## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention and GrowthX to discuss content marketing progress and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content efforts showing initial traction: 10 clicks, rising impressions (2.8k for top article)](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [New content strategy developed: 20+ topics in clusters (sales engagement, deal tracking, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Exploring synergies between organic content insights and paid ad strategy](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Opportunity identified: Create gated content on sales rep compensation data as lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [42 articles published, 35 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [10 clicks received (up from 0 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Significant rise in impressions, particularly for "on target earnings" article (2.8k)](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Planning metadata optimization for 10 low CTR articles to improve clickability](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Exhausted initial topic list; Fatima developed new clusters/topics](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [New focus areas: sales engagement, deal tracking, revenue intelligence](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [20+ new topics identified for next content batch](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Analyzing current performance to inform future direction (e.g., "criteria for hiring tech sales rep" showing promising CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

### Paid Advertising Integration

  - [Discussing how to leverage organic content insights for paid strategy](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Suggestion to use converting keywords from organic efforts in paid campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Kyle offered to provide third-party audit of current paid strategy](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Marcel advised broader initial approach for learning, then refining with bid modifiers](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Content Marketing Tools & Techniques

  - [Demonstrated use of SEMrush for competitor ad analysis](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Suggestion to create data-driven lead magnets (e.g., sales rep compensation by industry/state)](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Potential for gated ebook strategy, similar to work done for Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)

### Product-Led Content Opportunities

  - [Discussed extracting insights from attention's transcript data for thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Potential to distill platform learnings into best practices content](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Challenge: Current bandwidth limitations for executing data-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)

### Content Topic Selection Criteria

  - [Based on competitor analysis, keyword metrics (volume, difficulty)](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Aligned with Attention's product/service offerings and ICP pain points](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Organized into content clusters for comprehensive coverage and SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Stewart highlighted interest in call center QA/quality assurance topics](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share gap analysis document with Stewart for prioritization input](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Implement metadata optimization for 10 low CTR articles](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Begin work on new 20+ topic content batch](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Explore creation of gated content on sales rep compensation data](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of refreshed content (starting next week)](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Stewart to consider leveraging team's bandwidth for data-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/WDVzi3QrqrrNXanr6ex14bGzrA27C3kT?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
